metric: trigger accuracy (claude -p Skill tool mentions agentic-review-handoff; 1 run/query)

baseline_old_description.source: git HEAD description (v3.1.0 auto-loop text, 945 chars)

coverage: second pair of eyes + feedback validation
negatives: ordinary impl, non-git, weekly-report, /codex:review, Grok /review

v3_1_2_codex_round.change: first-principles/DDD/high-cohesion/low-coupling promoted to capability summary + first Use-when branch; added low-coupling keyword and non-review design docs guard
v3_1_2_codex_round.verification: targeted re-eval, 3 queries, 1 run/query, claude -p --max-turns 2 stream-json Skill tool_use check, runtime copy synced via skills:install:local first
v3_1_2_codex_round.caveat: remaining 17 queries not re-run (keywords preserved superset of v3.1.1); measurement pitfall recorded: claude -p reads .agents/skills runtime copy, always sync before measuring

v3_2_1_t2_trigger_surface.method: pnpm skills:install:local first; claude -p --max-turns 2 stream-json Skill/Read tool_use contains agentic-review-handoff; props only under /tmp

queries.query: Please review the uncommitted cart-handler changes in my git repo at ~/coding/payment-svc — second pair of eyes, find real bugs, prefer auto loop with headless codex.
Team pasted review feedback claiming auth.ts returns 500 on empty token. Validate each claim as a defect report before any fix; use classic feedback validation packet if needed.
Add a React LoginForm with Zod email/password validation under apps/web and commit it. No review packet.

v3_2_1_t2_trigger_surface.note: description retuned to promote feedback validation in Use-when (first directed run undertriggered it)
v3_2_1_t2_trigger_surface.method_note: SUPERSEDED for metric comparison: used Skill/Read. See v3_2_2_t2_skill_only_remeasure.

v3_2_2_t2_skill_only_remeasure.method: pnpm skills:install:local first; claude -p --max-turns 2 stream-json; hit = Skill tool_use input contains agentic-review-handoff (NOT Read); props only under /tmp
v3_2_2_t2_skill_only_remeasure.metric_alignment: matches root metric: Skill tool only

queries.query: Please review the uncommitted cart-handler changes in my git repo at ~/coding/payment-svc — second pair of eyes, find real bugs, prefer auto loop with headless codex.
Team pasted review feedback claiming auth.ts returns 500 on empty token. Validate each claim as a defect report before any fix; use classic feedback validation packet if needed.

variance_probe.note: primary 1-run measurement did not trigger; two additional identical runs recorded for variance transparency (methodology unchanged: headline = run 1)

queries.query: Add a React LoginForm with Zod email/password validation under apps/web and commit it. No review packet.

v3_3_4_copyedit_neg_and_maintainer_slim.change: restore description negative 'copy-editing review comments'; collapse Maintainer-only section into Fast Path one-liner (Codex consult APPROVE_WITH_CHANGES; Claude 429)
v3_3_4_copyedit_neg_and_maintainer_slim.not_changed: classic prompt-only; codex|grok|claude CLI coupling; Fast Path bilingual (design tradeoffs)
v3_3_4_copyedit_neg_and_maintainer_slim.note: Negatives still need post-quota Skill-only remeasure; copy-edit phrase is low-cost near-miss guard.

v3_3_3_description_slim.change: description slimmed ~1023→634 chars (routing only); dual-window/migration removed from description; body T8 collapsed to Fast Path one-liner; maintainer gate pointer kept

consult.codex: APPROVE_WITH_CHANGES — target 600-700; keep feedback validation first; drop dual-window from description
consult.claude: APPROVE_WITH_CHANGES — keep PASS_WITH_CONCERNS + Review Intake; keep maintainer gate in body; T8 one line

skill_creator_stock_run_eval.detail: python -m scripts.run_eval injects temp .claude/commands/<name>-skill-<uuid>.md and only counts hits on that UUID name. With agentic-review-handoff already installed, Claude invokes the real skill name → all 10 positives false-negative (0/20 headline). Do not use stock run_eval for this skill without adapter.

skill_only_remeasure.method: custom runner agentic-review-handoff-workspace/trigger-v3.3.3/run_trigger_skill_only.py; claude -p --max-turns 2 stream-json; hit = Skill tool mentions agentic-review-handoff; 3 runs/query; 2 workers; pnpm skills:install:local first
skill_only_remeasure.metric_alignment: matches historical Skill-only metric (NOT skill-creator temp command UUID)

positives.note: threshold 0.5; only pos-consult was 2/3 (one miss). feedback-validation 3/3 (improved vs historical flaky).

negatives.detail: All 30 negative runs returned session limit (resets 4:40pm Asia/Singapore). 0/30 Skill hits is consistent with quota failure, NOT proof of non-trigger. Do not cite 10/10 neg as acceptance.

headline.overall: NOT full 20/20 acceptance — positives good; negatives need re-run after quota

v3_3_3_description_slim.t2_acceptance: Positives MET for v3.3.3 slim description under Skill-only 3-run threshold. Negatives NOT MET (quota). Re-run negatives after Claude session limit resets.

v3_2_3_description_fix_headline.change: feedback validation promoted to first Use-when clause of description (version 3.2.3); mirrors synced via pnpm skills:install:local + rsync to ~/.agents/skills (global install target)
v3_2_3_description_fix_headline.method_attempted: pnpm skills:install:local + rsync global mirror; claude -p --max-turns 2 stream-json; hit = Skill tool_use only (NOT Read); 3 runs/query
v3_2_3_description_fix_headline.remeasure_detail: claude -p returns is_error=true api_error_status=429: "You've hit your session limit · resets 7:30pm (Asia/Singapore)". All Skill-tool invocations currently return without tools; headline 1/3 is NOT valid evidence. Do not treat this as a description regression until a post-quota remeasure runs.

prior_valid_skill_only_evidence.note: Historical only: v3_2_2 headline under max-turns 2 was 2/3 (feedback-validation flaky). No verified 3/3 Skill-only result exists for current v3.2.3 description; remeasure after Claude quota restores with max-turns 2.

v3_2_3_description_fix_headline.t2_acceptance: NOT MET for v3.2.3 until a non-429 Skill-only, max-turns 2, 3-query run is recorded. Do not cite earlier Skill/Read or max-turns 5 runs as equivalent evidence.
